content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

An ancient, supreme, and barren aura erupted from Ye Tian's body, forming a huge coercion that was difficult to match.

Then, a layer of the Great Desolate Law Body appeared on Ye Tian's body, which was completely condensed by the Supreme Rule, and the entire body attracted a huge increase and change.

This moment.

Ye Tian turned into a three-meter body, and his momentum skyrocketed a lot, as if he could break the ancient realm with every move.

Then.

Some spectators exclaimed: "Zhongqian Dao Technique - Great Wilderness Law Body!"

The people who knew the Middle Thousand Dao Technique were shocked, but many True Ancestors did not know the Middle Thousand Dao Technique, and most of them were True Ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm.

"What is the Middle Thousand Dao Technique?"

A true ancestor of the Dao Mountain Realm asked curiously.

At this time, someone replied: "The Dao techniques we usually know are basically the Little Thousand Dao Technique, and the Middle Thousand Dao Technique is a level above the Little Thousand Dao Technique, unless you have a Dao-level natal talent, you can't practice the Middle Thousand Dao Technique at all." And even if you have a Dao-level natal talent, it is not easy to practice the Middle Thousand Dao Technique. The power of the Middle Thousand Dao Technique far exceeds that of the Small Thousand Dao Technique, and the Dao Technique performed by the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is called the Great Wilderness Law Body, which has both defense and amplification effects. It can be said that after casting the Great Wilderness Law Body, except for the top Supreme True Ancestor, I am afraid that no one will be able to defeat the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor. "

"No, there is another way, that is, to exhaust the power of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, and then you can defeat the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!

As soon as the Great Wilderness Law Body came out, Ye Tian was full of confidence and full of momentum, but the Xuanling True Ancestor was flustered.

"You have actually practiced the Great Wilderness Law Body, the Middle Thousand Dao Technique, and how can you have a way to obtain the Middle Thousand Dao Technique Inheritance?"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor said in horror.

The Liuli Sect also has three Thousand Dao Sect inheritances, which are the foundation of the Liuli Sect, but even he is not eligible to obtain the three Thousand Dao Sect Inheritance.

There's no way, even if he inherits the Zhongqian Dao Technique to him, he can't practice it!

Moreover, the Dao Ancestor of the First and Second Heavens of the Liuli Sect is not eligible to obtain the Middle Thousand Dao Technique Inheritance, and only the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor can exchange the Middle Thousand Dao Technique Inheritance if he has made great contributions or at a huge price.

In the eyes of the Xuanling True Ancestor, among the True Ancestors, the powerhouses who have mastered the inheritance of the Middle Thousand Dao Techniques are all some legendary geniuses.

Unexpectedly, he encountered such a genius today.

Ye Tian showed the forbidden body, he was not afraid, but Ye Tian showed the Great Wilderness Law Body, he was really afraid.

The improvement of the combat power of the Zhongqian Dao Technique was really too great, and the defensive effect of the Great Wilderness Law Body was too amazing, it was difficult for him to break Ye Tian's defense at all.

How can this be fought?

"Sky Splitting!"

Ye Tian once again performed this Dao technique.

Under the amplification of the Great Wilderness Law Body, the power and danger of the Sky Splitting Technique was close to that of the ordinary attack-type Middle Thousand Dao Technique, and such a terrifying attack power instantly injured the Xuanling True Ancestor, and it was not a light injury, but a rather serious injury.

Ye Tian didn't use other Dao techniques, if he cast too many Dao techniques, the fact that he had a variety of Dao-level natal talents would be exposed.

If someone combined the talent of the ten Dao-level natal talents in the battlefield ruins, then his copying talent might also be exposed.

Therefore, in such a situation in full view, Ye Tian naturally would not be stupid enough to expose all his Dao-level natal talents.

After he is promoted to Dao Ancestor, he will slowly expose all Dao techniques, and others will not associate them with Dao-level natal talents.

Sky Splitting!

Sky Splitting!

Sky Splitting!

Ye Tian did not hesitate to spend a lot of True Ancestor's power, and kept performing the Void Splitting Technique, severely damaging the Xuanling True Ancestor again and again.

At the same time, Ye Tian also urged the Forbidden Body to cast the Forbidden Spear, and such an attack was comparable to a Dao Technique blow.

The point is, the damage done by the Forbidden Spear is very difficult to recover.

As time passed, the injuries on the Xuan Ling True Ancestor's body became more and more serious, and even with his recovery speed, it was difficult to recover from his injuries.

Gradually, his combat effectiveness became weaker and weaker.

Anyone can see that the Xuanling True Ancestor can't stand it, and if it takes a while, I'm afraid it will fall and die.

"Ten Thousand Law True Ancestors, do you really want to kill me? Don't forget, our Liuli Sect still has dozens of top True Ancestors, and the Dark God Temple has already taken refuge in us, a large number of True Ancestors have entered the Void Heaven True Country, even if you have the strongest True Ancestor combat power, you can't protect the Void Heaven True Country! If you kill me, the Void Heaven True Kingdom will be destroyed!"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor threatened.

"If the Liuli Sect dares to attack the Void Heaven True Country, I will assassinate them one by one, with my strength, who of you Liuli Sect can stop me? Believe it or not, I will kill not a single true ancestor of your Liuli Sect, unless your Liuli Sect can't come out!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian glanced at Xuangang True Ancestor through the enchantment.

This glance made Xuangang True Ancestor tremble, as if he had witnessed death.

As time slowly passed, the Xuanling True Ancestor really couldn't stop it, and every life-saving thing was consumed.

Suddenly.

A forbidden spear pierced through the head of the Xuan Ling True Ancestor, and then the Sky Splitting Technique slammed into his body, directly tearing him into pieces.

"Fall!"

Ye Tian continued to attack, causing the vitality of the Xuan Ling True Ancestor to pass quickly.

Suddenly.

The vitality of the Xuanling True Ancestor passed quickly, the broken body turned into a corpse, and the soul of the Xuanling True Ancestor was completely shattered.

A Supreme True Ancestor has fallen!

At this time, Ye Tian's True Ancestor's power had also been consumed by at least eighty percent, and the consumption of physical strength and divine soul power was also very serious, and due to the repeated use of the Sky Splitting Technique and the forcible maintenance of the Great Wilderness Law Body, his body also began to crack.

Fortunately, the Xuanling True Ancestor had fallen, otherwise it would have been difficult for Ye Tian to hold on for long.

The Xuanling True Ancestor fell, and many True Ancestors of the Liuli Sect were extremely lost.

This is the only supreme true ancestor of their Liuli Sect!

With the fall of the Xuanling True Ancestor, their Liuli Sect was equivalent to losing the only supreme true ancestor and the pillar of deterrence against other forces.

It can even be said that the Liuli Sect can't even deter some of the Triple Heaven forces!

In the Liuli Sect, the Fire Cloud True Ancestor was also dumbfounded.

He didn't think that the combination of the Dark God Temple and the Liuli Sect would definitely destroy the Void Heaven True Kingdom and deal a heavy blow to the Void Heaven Pulse.

But now, before the attack began, the Xuanling True Ancestor hung up directly.

"What should I do, continue to persuade Xuangang True Ancestor to attack the Void Heaven True Country?"

He didn't dare to say it, for fear of angering Xuangang True Ancestor.

After all, the Xuan Ling True Ancestor died because of the fall of the Dark Temple, and he may also be full of anger towards the Dark Temple.

At this time, he had better keep a low profile, otherwise he would be killed by the Liuli Sect, and it would be too wronged!

As soon as the Xuanling True Ancestor died, although the Liuli Sect was angry, he didn't dare to make a move.

Ye Tian's words really shocked him, the Liuli Sect currently has no True Ancestor who can contain Ye Tian, if Ye Tian really assassinates the True Ancestors of the Liuli Sect, no one can stop him.

Maybe they besieged Ye Tian and could kill Ye Tian, but how difficult it was like this!

They didn't dare to gamble, once they lost the bet, the Liuli Sect would probably not be able to wait for the day when the Dao Ancestors woke up.

Ye Tian removed the Ten Directions Demarcation Stone, but this kind of treasure was useless after being used once, and it was directly shattered and turned into a waste stone.

Seeing that the Liuli Sect didn't make a move, Ye Tian left with several true ancestors of the human race and returned to the Void Heaven True Country.

And at this time, the Liuli Sect also lost its last chance, and never had the chance to kill Ye Tian again.

......

Ye Tian's battle to kill the Xuanling True Ancestor was publicized, which shocked countless powerhouses in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Black Wind Mountain.

When the Dragon Power Peak Lord learned that Ye Tian had killed a Supreme True Ancestor, he was immediately dumbfounded.

He remembered that he had guided Ye Tian to become the peak master not long ago, and Ye Tiancai at that time had barely crossed the threshold of the top true ancestor, and he was far from being his opponent.

But now, Ye Tian has killed a Supreme True Ancestor, and he has not yet entered the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor!

This shows that Ye Tian's strength has surpassed him and has the strength to kill him.

With the strength of the strongest True Ancestor, coupled with the fact that there are not enough generals in Black Wind Mountain at present, Ye Tian can even apply to become a general in Black Wind Mountain.

In fact, it was just ten years after Ye Tian killed the Xuanling True Ancestor.

The bloody general personally summoned Ye Tian and invited Ye Tian to become a general in Black Wind Mountain!
